meta.title: Methods for characterization of Streptomyces species

abstractHtml: The methods used by collaborators in the International Streptomyces Project (ISP) for emendation of descriptions of type and neotype strains of the genus Streptomyces (Actinomycetales) are presented.
bodyHtml: • ↵1 This project is supported in part by a research grant from the National Science Foundation, U.S.A. The Subcommittee on Actinomycetes of the Committee on Taxonomy, A.S.M. and the Subcommittee on Taxonomy of Actinomycetes of the International Committee on Bacteriological Nomenclature are co-sponsoring advisors.
affiliationsHtml:
• Department of Botany and Bacteriology Ohio Wesleyan University, Delaware, Ohio
  • Department of Plant Pathology University of Illinois, Urbana, Illinois
